list.emptyDescription: Generate an invoice to initiate billing and manage customer payments.

details.updateInvoiceStatusSubtitle: Updating the invoice status will not impact the payment status.
details.chooseFormat: Choose a format for this invoice.

lineItemsTable.netPayableTooltip: Final amount due after applying credit notes

paymentStatusModal.subtitle: Changing the payment status of this invoice will not initiate a payment collection attempt
paymentStatusModal.succeededDescription: Marks the invoice as successfully paid.
paymentStatusModal.failedDescription: Indicates that the payment attempt was unsuccessful.
paymentStatusModal.pendingDescription: Keeps the invoice in a pending state while awaiting payment.

creditNotes.title: Credit Notes

list.emptyDescription: Add a credit note to adjust or refund customer invoices.

creditNotes.memoNote: This will appear on the credit note

preview.refundEffect: This credit note will process a refund for the paid amount.
preview.refundSettlement: The refunded amount will be credited to the customer's original payment method or wallet balance.
preview.adjustmentEffect: This credit note will adjust the current invoice amount.
preview.adjustmentSettlement: The adjustment will be applied to the current billing period, reducing the amount due.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions

emptyState.description: Create your first subscription to start billing your customers.

listPage.inheritedReadOnlyTooltip: Inherited subscriptions are read-only. Make changes on the parent subscription.

subscriptions.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this subscription?
subscriptions.generateInvoiceHint: Enabled: send generate_invoice. Disabled: send skip.
subscriptions.reasonHint: This reason is sent only when provided.
subscriptions.internalNote: Add an internal note for this cancellation
subscriptions.inheritanceNote: The subscription stays on the customer as a standalone subscription; it will no longer mirror this parent.

cancelDialog.subtitle: This action cannot be undone. Review cancellation settings before continuing.
cancelDialog.immediateDescription: Cancel now and apply the selected proration and invoice policy.
cancelDialog.endOfPeriodDescription: Keep service active until period end, then cancel automatically.
cancelDialog.scheduledDateDescription: Cancel on a specific future date you choose.
cancelDialog.prorationCreateDescription: Create proration credits or charges based on timing.

inheritanceEdit.externalIdRequired: Customer "{{name}}" must have an external ID
inheritanceEdit.emptyState: No customers inherit this subscription yet

quantityModify.effectiveDateHint: Defaults to the current period start for arrear charges, or the current period end for advance charges, ensuring the charge takes effect this period. Clear the date to apply immediately.

modifyPreview.subscriptionUpdated: <bold>Subscription</bold> will be updated to reflect these changes.
modifyPreview.noExtraBillingDetails: No additional billing details were included in this preview.
modifyPreview.noBillingChanges: No billing changes returned for this preview.

addAddonDialog.emptyNoChargesForPeriodCurrency: No charges for this billing period/currency.

editDetailsHeader.title: Subscription Details
editDetailsHeader.inheritedReadOnlyTooltip: Inherited subscriptions mirror the parent; update the parent subscription instead.
editDetailsHeader.inheritedReadOnlyTitle: Inherited subscriptions are read-only; edit the parent subscription.

payments.title: Payments
payments.referenceIdHint: Enter the reference number or payment details from your payment processor.
payments.recordedAtPlaceholder: Select when the payment was recorded (optional)
payments.noPostPaidWallets: No post-paid wallets available with matching currency
payments.chooseWallet: Choose a post-paid wallet or auto-select
payments.walletHint: Post-paid wallets are used to pay invoices during payment processing. Select a specific post-paid wallet or let the system choose from all available post-paid wallets.
payments.recordFirstDescription: Add a payment record to manage customer charges and settlements.
payments.recordedReceivedHint: Optionally select the date when this payment was actually received
payments.paymentMethodUnavailable: {{method}} payment processing is not available yet. Please use offline payment method or credits instead.

transactions.emptyDescription: Wallet transactions will appear here once customers make payments or receive credits.

toast.saveFailedCreate: Failed to create tax rate. Please try again.
toast.saveFailedUpdate: Failed to update tax rate. Please try again.

list.emptyDescription: Set up tax rates to automatically calculate taxes on invoices and ensure compliance with local regulations.

drawer.descCreate: Create a new tax rate for your billing system.
drawer.nameHint: A descriptive name for this tax rate (e.g., "GST", "VAT", "Sales Tax").
drawer.codeHintEdit: Tax rate code cannot be changed after creation.
drawer.codeHintCreate: A unique identifier for this tax rate (e.g., "GST", "VAT").
drawer.taxTypeHintEdit: Tax type cannot be changed after creation.
drawer.taxTypeHintCreate: Choose how the tax is calculated.
drawer.percentageHintEdit: Percentage value cannot be changed after creation.
drawer.fixedHintEdit: Fixed amount cannot be changed after creation.
drawer.fixedHintCreate: Enter the fixed amount in your default currency.
drawer.descriptionHint: Optional description to help your team understand this tax rate.

validation.percentageRange: Percentage value must be between 0 and 100
validation.fixedNonNegative: Fixed value must be greater than or equal to 0

updateSubscription.title: Update subscription
updateSubscription.setParent: Set parent subscription for this subscription.

commitmentConfig.title: Configure Commitment
commitmentConfig.overageFactorHint: Multiplier applied to usage beyond commitment (e.g., 1.2 = 20% premium on overage)
commitmentConfig.enableTrueUpHint: Charge the commitment amount even if usage is below the commitment
commitmentConfig.windowCommitmentHint: Apply commitment to each bucket window (meter has bucket size: {{bucketSize}})
commitmentConfig.existingNotice: This price already has a commitment configuration. Your changes will update it.

errors.bothAmountAndQuantity: Cannot set both amount and quantity commitment
errors.typeMismatchAmount: When an amount is set, commitment type must be amount
errors.typeMismatchQuantity: When a quantity is set, commitment type must be quantity
errors.overageRequired: Overage factor is required when commitment is set
errors.overageGtOne: Overage factor must be greater than 1.0

lineItem.title: Terminate Line Item
lineItem.hint: Leave empty to terminate immediately. Select a future date to schedule termination.

price.title: Terminate Price
price.hint: Leave empty to terminate immediately. Select a future date to schedule termination.

cancelModal.title: Delete Credit Grant
cancelModal.body: You are about to delete the credit grant "{{name}}". This action will stop future applications of this credit grant.
cancelModal.dateHint: Leave empty to delete immediately, or select a future date to schedule the deletion.
cancelModal.noteRest: This action cannot be undone. All future applications will be stopped.

modal.conversionRateHint: Amount in currency equivalent to 1 credit. For example, if conversion rate is 2, then 1 credit = 2 units of currency.
modal.topupConversionRateHint: Conversion rate for top-ups. Defaults to the main conversion rate if not specified.

subscriptionModal.title: Add Credit Grant
subscriptionModal.periodEndHint: The effective date is the current period end.

topup.typeHintPurchased: Purchased credits require payment. Generate invoice to track the purchase.
topup.typeHintFree: Free credits are granted without a charge.
topup.creditPreviewSuffix: will be credited to the wallet
topup.referenceIdDescription: This reference ID will be used as the idempotency key for the transaction.
topup.descriptionHint: Add any specific details about this transaction.

debit.title: Manual Debit
debit.description: Manually debit the credits from your wallet. This action will reduce the wallet balance.
debit.preview: {{amount}} will be debited from the wallet
debit.referenceIdDescription: This reference ID will be used as the idempotency key for the transaction.

alerts.enableLabel: Monitor wallet balance against configured thresholds
alerts.enableDescription: Get notified when balance crosses configured thresholds for this wallet
alerts.criticalDescription: Alert when balance reaches critical level
alerts.warningDescription: Alert when balance reaches warning level
alerts.infoDescription: Alert when balance reaches info level

autoTopup.enableLabel: Automatically add credits when ongoing balance falls below threshold
autoTopup.enableDescription: When enabled, credits will be automatically added to the wallet when the ongoing balance drops below the specified threshold
autoTopup.thresholdDescription: Minimum ongoing balance (in credits) that triggers auto top-up. When ongoing balance falls below this value, auto top-up will be triggered.
autoTopup.amountDescription: Number of credits to add when auto top-up is triggered
autoTopup.invoiceLabel: Create invoice for auto top-up (requires payment before credits are added)
autoTopup.invoiceDescriptionWhenInvoiced: Credits will be added only after the invoice is paid. An invoice will be created in PENDING state when auto top-up is triggered.
autoTopup.invoiceDescriptionImmediate: Credits will be added immediately when auto top-up is triggered.

terminate.title: Terminate Wallet
terminate.subtitle: Are you sure you want to terminate this wallet? This action cannot be undone.

tierBreakdown.title: Tier Breakdown
tierBreakdown.volumeModeBody: All {{usageQuantity}} units charged at the highest tier rate of {{rate}} per unit.
tierBreakdown.slabModeBody: Each tier range priced separately and summed.

saveCardModal.title: Save Card on Stripe
saveCardModal.intro: This will create a secure payment setup link that allows the customer to save their card details on Stripe for future payments.
saveCardModal.defaultMethodHint: Make this the primary payment method for the customer
saveCardModal.successBody: Your card setup link has been successfully created!
